subtitle.ja: 中指の構えから始めます。両手親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin with the Middle Finger Base. Release both thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手親指で、中指と小指手前の糸を越えて小指の向こう側の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the near middle- and little-finger strings and pick up from below the far little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指の輪に親指を下から入れて広げます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the middle-finger loops and spread them open.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の、上の糸を残したまま親指同士を繋いでいる下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper thumb strings, release only the lower string that runs between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指を、親指の前にある三角の輪に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both middle fingers from above into the triangular loops in front of the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を外し、両手を左右に広げます。中指の背の糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: Release both little-finger strings and spread the hands apart. The strings on the backs of the middle fingers will fall away naturally.

subtitle.ja: 両手のひらを向こう側に向けて手を広げて完成です
subtitle.en: Turn the palms away and open the hands to complete the figure.
